value.evidence: This paper will compare two countries who are at very different stages of progress in the development of a GDF: the USA, which had a proposed site at Yucca Mountain, Nevada and invested millions of dollars in characterisation of this site, and Finland which now has a license to construct the first GDF for the disposal of civil nuclear waste. It defines any site which stores nuclear waste, including a GDF, as a nuclear facility and must therefore abide by the laws stated in the Nuclear Energy Act.
